name: Guide to Computer Security Log Management
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-92 (2006) provides guidance on log management for computer security — log generation, transmission, storage, analysis, and disposal. Foundational for SIEM/SOC design.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-platform log management (CloudTrail, Azure Monitor, GCP Cloud Logging) implements 800-92 principles.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI workload telemetry and audit-log management.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.
